title: CartUpgrader
description: A minecraft Fabric mod which enables container and other minecarts drop themselves when they are destroyed.
body:
A Minecraft 1.16.5 fabric mod, which enables container and other minecarts drop themselves when they're destroyed, as their behaviors in 1.19+.

**This is only an experimental mod. Please backup your saves before use.**

Visit my github page to know more:[Codes](https://github.com/Luan-Fuzi/CartUpgrader "github")

### These minecart entities are involved:

* Minecart(itself)
* Minecart with Hopper
* Minecart with Chest
* Minecart with Furnace
* Minecart with TNT

### Depends:

* Minecraft 1.16.5
* Fabric Loader >=0.14.0
* Fabric API >= 0.30.0
